Petitioner Serramonte Ridge Llc'S Notice Of Motion Hearing On Petition To Vacate Arbitration Award.
Off Calendar Jun-05-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JONATHAN R. BASS OF COBLENTZ, PATCH, DUFFY & BASS LLP, TEL. NO. 772-5726 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. EUGENE WHITLOCK, DEPUTY COUNSEL, TEL. NO. (650) 363-4989 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - Judge Kahn disclosed that he and Mr. Bass are litigation adversary for a long time and does not view this as a basis for not hearing this matter. No objections were made. The matter was argued. Petitioner Serramonte Ridge Llc'S Hearing On Petition To Vacate Arbitration Award taken under submission. Each side to submit form of order for the court's consideration. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)
